Feedback? Ideas? Complaints? Suggestions? Request for report about other area? send me a message!
This page was generated using data obtained on various dates including 2023-09-21, -data-was-not-downloaded-for-now-, 2023-09-22. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




Proposed edits at this page are so obvious that automatic edit makes sense.
  • wikipedia tag unexpected language
  • wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for brand prefixed tags
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for network prefixed tags
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for species prefixed tags
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for name:etymology prefixed tags

wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal
wikipedia tag in outdated form (['wikipedia:en']), with wikipedia and wikidata tag present and may be safely removed
Indiana - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( relation(1994099)['wikidata'='Q8560764']['wikipedia'='es:Distrito de Indiana']['wikipedia:en'='Indiana District, Maynas']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed

Prairie Crossing - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q60164879 vs Q35248367
Cairo Regional Airport - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(7137271287)['wikidata'='Q7237847']['wikipedia'='en:Prairie Crossing station']; way(1122563494)['wikidata'='Q10851271']['wikipedia'='en:Jackson Municipal Airport (Alabama)']; way(186217138)['wikidata'='Q7074194']['wikipedia'='en:Oakridge Cemetery']; way(27862021)['wikidata'='Q107271420']['wikipedia'='en:Welles Park (Chicago)']; way(658179263)['wikidata'='Q60164879']['wikipedia'='en:Cairo Regional Airport']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for brand prefixed tags
brand:wikidata and brand:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because brand:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for network prefixed tags
network:wikidata and network:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because network:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
